heading: Limitations
body:
You cannot use both LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) and SCRAM authentication for the same
database user.

You cannot use OIDC (OpenID Connect) authentication when LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authorization is enabled.
When you enable LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authorization, the LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) server handles all
authorization decisions, including for any external authentication mechanisms.
Therefore, if you try to connect to Atlas by using OIDC (OpenID Connect),
the connection fails. You must disable LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authorization in order to use OIDC (OpenID Connect)
authentication.
